# This test verifies that MMA repair removes excess non-voter replicas. All 10
# ranges start with 3 voters + 3 non-voters (6 total) but the span config
# requires only 5 replicas (3V+2NV). MMA must remove 1 non-voter per range.
#
# Expected outcome: all ranges reduced to 5 replicas, no over-replicated ranges.

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,2)
----

# Create ranges with 3 voters + 3 non-voters.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=6 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3,s4:NON_VOTER,s5:NON_VOTER,s6:NON_VOTER}:1
----

# Config says 5 replicas with 3 voters (one non-voter is excess).
set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

assertion type=conformance over=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
